revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Dating maintenance categories progress box]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Dating maintenance categories progress box]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

<noinclude> :''Note: due to the fact that this includes duplicates and undated sub-cats, the total will be overstated by about a few dozen for the cats and a few handfuls for multiply tagged articles.'' </noinclude>{{Dating_maintenance_categories_progress_box/core<!--|debug=yes--> |title={{{title|Dating maintenance categories progress box}}} |total only={{{total only|}}}| |Articles with invalid date parameter in template<!-- -->|1911 Britannica articles needing updates<!-- -->|Accuracy disputes<!-- -->|Use American English<!-- -->|Articles about possible neologisms<!-- -->|Articles that include images for deletion<!-- -->|Articles to be merged<!-- -->|Articles with close paraphrasing of public domain sources<!-- -->|Articles with improper non-free content<!-- -->|Articles with links needing disambiguation<!-- -->|Articles with neologism issues<!-- -->|Use Australian English<!-- -->|BLP articles lacking sources<!-- -->|Unreferenced BLPs<!-- -->|Use British English<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles containing buzzwords<!-- -->|Use Canadian English<!-- -->|Articles needing additional categories<!-- -->|Uncategorized pages<!-- -->|Articles with broken or outdated citations<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles needing clarification<!-- -->|Clean-up categories<!-- -->|Articles needing cleanup<!-- -->|Wikipedia categories needing cleanup<!-- -->|Wikipedia pages needing cleanup<!-- -->|Wikipedia templates needing cleanup<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles with possible conflicts of interest<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles needing context<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles needing copy edit<!-- -->|Copied and pasted articles and sections<!-- -->|Pages with excessive dablinks<!-- -->|Articles containing potentially dated statements<!-- -->|Use dmy dates<!-- -->|Use mdy dates<!-- -->|Articles with dead external links<!-- -->|Dead-end pages<!-- -->|Deprecated templates<!-- -->|Disambiguation pages in need of cleanup<!-- -->|Articles with disputed statements<!-- -->|Use Oxford spelling<!-- -->|Articles to be expanded<!-- -->|Articles needing expert attention by month<!-- -->|Wikipedia external links cleanup<!-- -->|Articles that need to differentiate between fact and fiction<!-- -->|Vague or ambiguous geographic scope<!-- -->|Articles with limited geographic scope<!-- -->|Articles with ibid<!-- -->|Articles sourced only by IMDb<!-- -->|Articles sourced by IMDb<!-- -->|Articles lacking in-text citations<!-- -->|Incomplete disambiguation<!-- -->|Use Indian English<!-- -->|Wikipedia introduction cleanup<!-- -->|Articles with bare URLs for citations<!-- -->|Incomplete lists<!-- -->|Wikipedia list cleanup<!-- -->|Articles that may be too long<!-- -->|Miscellaneous pages that include images for deletion<!-- -->|Articles with topics of unclear notability<!-- -->|Wikipedia neutral point of view disputes<!-- -->|Articles with obsolete information<!-- -->|Articles that may contain original research<!-- -->|Orphaned articles<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles needing page number citations<!-- -->|Articles lacking page references<!-- -->|Pages with non-English text lacking appropriate markup<!-- -->|Use Pakistani English<!-- -->|Articles with peacock terms<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles with plot summary needing attention<!-- -->|Articles with minor POV problems<!-- -->|Articles with a promotional tone<!-- -->|Articles with sections that need to be turned into prose<!-- -->|User-created public domain files<!-- -->|Articles slanted towards recent events<!-- -->|Recently revised<!-- -->|Articles needing additional references<!-- -->|Articles lacking reliable references<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles needing reorganization<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles needing rewrite<!-- -->|Articles needing sections<!-- -->|Articles with excessive see also sections<!-- -->|Self-contradictory articles<!-- -->|Articles lacking sources<!-- -->|Wikipedia spam cleanup<!-- -->|Article sections to be split<!-- -->|Articles to be split<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles with style issues by month<!-- -->|Articles requiring tables<!-- -->|Talk pages that include images for deletion<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles that are too technical<!-- -->|Templates that include images for deletion<!-- -->|Vague or ambiguous time<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles needing time reference citations<!-- -->|Articles with trivia sections<!-- -->|Articles with unsourced statements<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles in need of updating<!-- -->|User pages that include images for deletion<!-- -->|Userspace drafts<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles needing factual verification<!-- -->|Articles needing more viewpoints<!-- -->|Articles with specifically marked weasel-worded phrases<!-- -->|Articles with weasel words<!-- -->|Articles covered by WikiProject Wikify<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles needing a junction list<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles without plot summaries<!-- -->|Articles needing the year an event occurred<!-- -->|Autobiographical articles<!-- -->}}<noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia progress templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dating_maintenance_categories_progress_box here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dating_maintenance_categories_progress_box for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <noinclude> :''Note: due to the fact that this includes duplicates and undated sub-cats, the total will be overstated by about a few dozen for the cats and a few handfuls for multiply tagged articles.'' </noinclude>{{Dating_maintenance_categories_progress_box/core<!--|debug=yes--> |title={{{title|Dating maintenance categories progress box}}} |total only={{{total only|}}}| |Articles with invalid date articles containing buzzwords<!-- -->|Use Canadian English<!-- -->|Articles needing additional categories<!-- -->|Uncategorized pages<!-- -->|Articles with broken or outdated citations<!-- lacking reliable references<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles needing reorganization<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles needing rewrite<!-- -->|Articles needing sections<!-- -->|Articles with excessive see also sections<!-- -->|Self-contradictory articles<!-- -->|Articles lacking sources<!-- -->|Wikipedia spam cleanup<!-- -->|Article sections to be split<!-- -->|Articles to be split<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles with style issues by month<!-- -->|Articles requiring tables<!-- -->|Talk pages that include images for deletion<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles that are too technical<!-- -->|Templates that include images for deletion<!-- -->|Vague or ambiguous time<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles needing time reference citations<!-- -->|Articles with trivia sections<!-- -->|Articles with unsourced statements<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles in need of updating<!-- -->|User pages that include images for deletion<!-- -->|Userspace drafts<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles needing factual verification<!-- -->|Articles needing more viewpoints<!-- -->|Articles with specifically marked weasel-worded phrases<!-- -->|Articles with weasel words<!-- -->|Articles covered by WikiProject Wikify<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles needing a junction list<!-- -->|Wikipedia articles without plot summaries<!-- -->|Articles needing the year an event occurred<!-- -->|Autobiographical articles<!-- -->}}<noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia progress templates]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dating_maintenance_categories_progress_box for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <noinclude> :''Note: due to the fact that this includes duplicates and undated sub-cats, the total will be overstated by about a few dozen for the cats and a few handfuls for multiply tagged articles.'' </noinclude>{{Dating_maintenance_categories_progress_box/core |title={{{title|Dating maintenance categories progress box}}} |total only={{{total only|}}}| |Articles with invalid date parameter in template|1911 Britannica articles needing updates|Accuracy disputes|Use American English|Articles about possible neologisms|Articles that include images for deletion|Articles to be merged|Articles with close paraphrasing of public domain sources|Articles with improper non-free content|Articles with links needing disambiguation|Articles with neologism issues|Use Australian English|BLP articles lacking sources|Unreferenced BLPs|Use British English|Wikipedia articles containing buzzwords|Use Canadian English|Articles needing additional categories|Uncategorized pages|Articles with broken or outdated citations|Wikipedia articles needing clarification|Clean-up categories|Articles needing cleanup|Wikipedia categories needing cleanup|Wikipedia pages needing cleanup|Wikipedia templates needing cleanup|Wikipedia articles with possible conflicts of interest|Wikipedia articles needing context|Wikipedia articles needing copy edit|Copied and pasted articles and sections|Pages with excessive dablinks|Articles containing potentially dated statements|Use dmy dates|Use mdy dates|Articles with dead external links|Dead-end pages|Deprecated templates|Disambiguation pages in need of cleanup|Articles with disputed statements|Use Oxford spelling|Articles to be expanded|Articles needing expert attention by month|Wikipedia external links cleanup|Articles that need to differentiate between fact and fiction|Vague or ambiguous geographic scope|Articles with limited geographic scope|Articles with ibid|Articles sourced only by IMDb|Articles sourced by IMDb|Articles lacking in-text citations|Incomplete disambiguation|Use Indian English|Wikipedia introduction cleanup|Articles with bare URLs for citations|Incomplete lists|Wikipedia list cleanup|Articles that may be too long|Miscellaneous pages that include images for deletion|Articles with topics of unclear notability|Wikipedia neutral point of view disputes|Articles with obsolete information|Articles that may contain original research|Orphaned articles|Wikipedia articles needing page number citations|Articles lacking page references|Pages with non-English text lacking appropriate markup|Use Pakistani English|Articles with peacock terms|Wikipedia articles with plot summary needing attention|Articles with minor POV problems|Articles with a promotional tone|Articles with sections that need to be turned into prose|User-created public domain files|Articles slanted towards recent events|Recently revised|Articles needing additional references|Articles lacking reliable references|Wikipedia articles needing reorganization|Wikipedia articles needing rewrite|Articles needing sections|Articles with excessive see also sections|Self-contradictory articles|Articles lacking sources|Wikipedia spam cleanup|Article sections to be split|Articles to be split|Wikipedia articles with style issues by month|Articles requiring tables|Talk pages that include images for deletion|Wikipedia articles that are too technical|Templates that include images for deletion|Vague or ambiguous time|Wikipedia articles needing time reference citations|Articles with trivia sections|Articles with unsourced statements|Wikipedia articles in need of updating|User pages that include images for deletion|Userspace drafts|Wikipedia articles needing factual verification|Articles needing more viewpoints|Articles with specifically marked weasel-worded phrases|Articles with weasel words|Articles covered by WikiProject Wikify|Wikipedia articles needing a junction list|Wikipedia articles without plot summaries|Articles needing the year an event occurred|Autobiographical articles}}<noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia progress templates]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
